title: RunFrame
description: The task frame describing the context and policy environment for an agent run.

frame_id.description: Unique identifier for this run frame.

task.description: The task or goal the agent was given.

actor.description: The agent or system performing the run.

environment.description: The environment in which the run occurred (e.g. production, staging).

allowed_tools.description: Tools the agent was permitted to use.

blocked_tools.description: Tools the agent was explicitly prohibited from using.

policy_version.description: The version of the policy set applied during the run.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the frame was created.
